萧.origin: The grass radical 艹; it means bleak or desolate, and is a surname.

著.origin: The grass radical 艹; it means to write a book or to show clearly.

葛.origin: The grass radical 艹; it is the name of a vine plant, and a surname.

sentence.en: Kudzu root can be made into medicine.

董.origin: The grass radical 艹; it means to oversee, and is a surname.

葬.origin: A body 死 laid 廾 to rest under the grass 艹; it means to bury.

葱.origin: The grass radical 艹; it means green onion or scallion.

sentence.en: Chopped scallions are sprinkled in the soup.

蒂.origin: The grass radical 艹; it means the stem base where a fruit joins the plant.

sentence.en: The melon stem connects to the vine.

蒋.origin: The grass radical 艹; it is the name of a grass, and a common surname.

蒙.origin: The grass radical 艹; it means to cover or to deceive.

蒜.origin: The grass radical 艹; it means garlic.

蒲.origin: The grass radical 艹 with water; it means cattail, a marsh plant.

蒸.origin: The grass radical 艹 over rising heat 烝; it means to steam.

蒿.origin: The grass radical 艹; it is the name of a wild herb, wormwood.

蓄.origin: The grass radical 艹; it means to store up or to save.

蓬.origin: The grass radical 艹; it means a fluffy plant, or messy and unkempt.

蔡.origin: The grass radical 艹; it is an old plant name and a common surname.

蔫.origin: The grass radical 艹; it means withered, wilted, or droopy.

蔬.origin: The grass radical 艹; it means vegetable.

蔽.origin: The grass radical 艹; it means to cover or to shelter.

sentence.en: The big tree blocks the sunlight.

薄.origin: The grass radical 艹; it means thin or slight.

sentence.en: This sheet of paper is very thin.

薅.origin: The grass radical 艹; it means to pull up weeds.

sentence.en: The farmer weeds in the field.

薛.origin: A kind of bitter 辛 grass 艹; today it is mostly a surname.

薪.origin: Freshly-cut 新 wood 艹; it means firewood, and also salary.

薰.origin: The grass radical 艹; it means a fragrant herb, like lavender.

藕.origin: The grass radical 艹; it means lotus root.

藤.origin: The grass radical 艹; it means vine or creeper.

sentence.en: Vines climb all over the wall.

蘸.origin: The grass radical 艹; it means to dip something into liquid.

sentence.en: He dips the bread in the soup.

虎.origin: A tiger 虍 standing on a rock 几; it means tiger.

虚.origin: Made with the tiger top 虍; it means empty, false, or weak.

sentence.en: He is weak after the illness.

虞.origin: Made with the tiger top 虍; it means worry, and is a surname.

虹.origin: The insect radical 虫; it means rainbow.

sentence.en: There is a rainbow after the rain.

蚀.origin: An insect 虫 nibbling; it means to eat away or erode.

蚌.origin: The insect radical 虫; it means clam or mussel.

sentence.en: There is a pearl inside the clam.

蚕.origin: The insect radical 虫; it means silkworm.

蚝.origin: A hairy 毛 worm 虫; it means oyster.

sentence.en: Oyster sauce was added to the dish.

蛀.origin: The insect radical 虫; it means a wood-boring insect, or to be worm-eaten.

蛆.origin: The insect radical 虫; it means maggot.

sentence.en: There are maggots in the trash.

蛇.origin: The insect radical 虫; it means snake.

sentence.en: There is a snake in the grass.

蛙.origin: The insect radical 虫; it means frog.

sentence.en: The frog is on the lotus leaf.

蛮.origin: Said to be wild like 亦 insects 虫; it means rough, or quite/very.

蛹.origin: The insect radical 虫; it means pupa, the stage before a moth.

sentence.en: The pupa turns into a moth.

蜀.origin: An old character; it is the ancient name for the Sichuan region.

sentence.en: The Shu region has beautiful scenery.

蜂.origin: The insect radical 虫; it means bee or wasp.

蜇.origin: The insect radical 虫; it means jellyfish, and also to sting.

sentence.en: Jellyfish can be eaten in a cold dish.

蜡.origin: The insect radical 虫; it means wax or candle.

蝇.origin: The insect radical 虫; it means fly.

蝉.origin: The insect radical 虫; it means cicada.

融.origin: Made with 鬲 (a pot); it means to melt or to blend together.

螯.origin: The insect radical 虫; it means the claws or pincers of a crab.

螺.origin: The insect radical 虫; it means a snail or spiral shell.

sentence.en: There are conch shells on the beach.
